title: Growing with Strength
subtitle: Development becomes more active
description: By week 14, your baby continues to grow steadily, and many body systems become more active. You may begin to feel more energetic as early pregnancy symptoms continue to ease.
what_to_expect: Increased fetal movement, though not yet felt
Energy levels may improve as symptoms reduce
care_tips: Maintain a balanced and nutrient-rich diet
Stay hydrated and follow regular meal timings
Engage in light physical activity like walking

medical_checkups.note: Routine monitoring continues during this stable phase.

commonly_suggested.name: Routine Prenatal Checkup
commonly_suggested.purpose: Monitors maternal health and fetal growth

commonly_suggested.name: Urine Test
commonly_suggested.purpose: Checks for infections and overall health markers

medical_checkups.guidance: Your doctor may schedule regular visits to track your progress and address any concerns.

important_note: This stage marks steady growth and increasing activity in your baby’s development.
reassurance: You may begin to feel more comfortable and energetic as your journey progresses.
medical_disclaimer: Continue following your healthcare provider’s guidance for a healthy pregnancy.

diabetes.personalized_description: Maintaining stable blood sugar levels supports ongoing growth and energy balance.
diabetes.medical_focus: Blood sugar levels may be reviewed during routine prenatal visits.

anemia.personalized_description: Adequate iron intake supports increased blood volume and energy levels.
care_tips: Include iron-rich foods in your meals
Pair with vitamin C for better absorption
anemia.medical_focus: Hemoglobin levels may be monitored during routine tests.
anemia.reassurance: Supporting your nutrition helps maintain your energy.

hypertension.personalized_description: Stable blood pressure supports proper circulation during this stage of growth.
hypertension.medical_focus: Blood pressure monitoring remains important during checkups.
hypertension.reassurance: A calm routine supports overall well-being.

thyroid.personalized_description: Balanced thyroid levels support continued development and metabolism.
thyroid.medical_focus: Thyroid function may be monitored during ongoing evaluations.
thyroid.reassurance: Consistency helps maintain a healthy balance.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: As your pregnancy progresses, managing multiple conditions requires steady and mindful care.
priority_tips: Avoid sudden lifestyle or dietary changes
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Small, consistent efforts support healthy development.
